data.title: Gemini's Nasdaq debut hits $4.4B valuation, marking a busy IPO week in the U.S. since 2021.
data.description: In a showcase of the most bustling week for initial public offerings in the United States since 2021, a prominent cryptocurrency exchange marked a notable highlight.

data.title: Senator Jain & Councilmember Henderson to discuss D.C. autonomy on Sept. 16. Topics: D.C. statehood, congressional control, National Guard. Scheduled at National Press Club.
data.description: On September 12, 2025, Senator Ankit Jain and Councilmember Christina Henderson are set to engage in a discussion at the National Press Club in Washington. The focus will be on congressional attempts to assume authority over D.C., the activation of National Guard personnel, and the relevance of these developments to the ongoing campaign for D.C. statehood. The conversation aims to shed light on the implications of these actions and their impact on the political landscape, highlighting the significance of recent events in advocating for statehood for D.C.

data.title: Health Union announces winners of 2025 Social Health Awards, spotlighting health leaders driving transformative change in digital health.
data.description: In an event held in Philadelphia on September 12, 2025, a premier program has been launched to recognize health leaders who are spearheading transformative changes in digital health. Health Union, a prominent player in online health communities and the owner of the largest network of health leaders known as the Social Health Network, is proud to be at the forefront of this initiative. This program aims to highlight the contributions of individuals driving innovation in digital health and shaping the future of the industry.

data.title: Trader prefers Dogecoin, Solana ETFs over XRP, sees Bonk as 'explosive' meme coin. Bonk breaking out, with catalysts including Dogecoin ETF.
data.description: A pseudonymous millionaire meme coin trader known as Unipcs has highlighted the current buzz in the crypto industry, mentioning catalysts such as the upcoming Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) ETF and expectations of rate cuts. Unipcs pointed out that amidst this excitement, one highly potential meme coin that is being overlooked is Bonk (CRYPTO: BONK). In a recent post, Unipcs highlighted that Bonk has broken out of a descending wedge that spanned multiple months, accompanied by strong volume, a pattern that often signals upcoming parabolic rallies. Unipcs mentioned various factors contributing to this positive outlook, including the launch of both DOGE and BONK ETFs and the anticipated approval of certain developments.

data.title: Synopsys (SNPS) shares plummet over $216 (-36%) after Q3 results show issues with major customer.
data.description: In San Francisco on September 10, 2025, shareholders of Synopsys, Inc. (NASDAQ: SNPS) experienced a sharp decline in the value of their stocks, dropping by $216 (-36%) following the release of the company's Q3 2025 financial performance. The decrease was triggered by the announcement of major complications with a key foundry client.

data.title: EMCC USA officially launched by EMCC Global, focusing on excellence in coaching, mentoring, and supervision in the US.
data.description: EMCC Global has recently disclosed a significant development in the form of the launch of EMCC USA in Dover, Del. This new affiliate aims to enhance coaching, mentoring, and supervision standards across the United States by prioritizing excellence, ethics, and innovation. The expansion signifies a strategic move by EMCC Global to broaden its influence and reach within the coaching community, demonstrating its dedication to fostering growth and progress in the field. The establishment of EMCC USA marks a pivotal moment for the organization as it solidifies its presence in the American market.

data.title: Deepscent AI from South Korean company submitted to CES 2026 Awards in 4 categories.
data.description: A technology firm based in Seoul, South Korea, named Deepscent has announced that its innovative AI technology, known as Deepscent AI, is currently a contender in four different categories at the CES 2026 Innovation Awards.

data.title: UNice Hair introduces Bye-Bye Slip™ Wig for secure fit and comfort with zero-slip hold. Global launch on Sept. 12, 2025.
data.description: On September 12, 2025, UNice Hair, a renowned company in the human hair wigs and hair bundles industry, introduced the Bye-Bye Slip™ Wig. This innovative glueless wig offers a secure fit, comfortable wear all day long, and a natural appearance due to its advanced design. This release marks a significant development for UNice Hair as they continue to lead the global market in premium hair products.

data.title: Zamansky LLC targets Stifel Nicolaus & Co. in FINRA case for Edwardsville investors after significant losses in RMHIX.
data.description: In New York on September 12, 2025, Zamansky LLC initiated a FINRA arbitration lawsuit against Stifel Nicolaus & Co. for elderly investors residing in Edwardsville, Illinois. Recently, the Easterly ROCMuni High Income Municipal Bond Fund (RMHIX) experienced a significant decrease, losing around 50% of its total value.

data.title: Plug and Play partners with Ricoh to innovate digital workplace solutions, leading innovation platform.
data.description: In a recent update on September 12, 2025, from Sunnyvale, California, it was disclosed that Plug and Play, a renowned innovation platform, has formed a significant partnership with Ricoh Company, Ltd., a worldwide supplier of digital services and workplace solutions. This collaboration will witness Ricoh becoming a part of Plug and Play's network, aiming to enhance innovation and technological advancements.

data.title: ImageTrend achieves NEMSIS 3.5.1 compliance for its ePCR platform, Elite, among first nationwide.
data.description: EAGAN, Minnesota - On September 12, 2025, ImageTrend, LLC revealed that its ePCR platform, ImageTrend Elite, has reached NEMSIS v3.5.1 compliance for both Collect Data and Receive & Process functions. This makes ImageTrend one of the pioneering vendors nationwide to attain compliance for Receive & Process.

data.title: Military Influencer Conference 2025 to be sponsored by USAA, reaffirming support for service members. Event scheduled for Sept. 21-24 in Atlanta.
data.description: In Atlanta, the Military Influencer Conference (MIC) announced its presenting and major sponsors for MIC 2025, happening on Sept. 21–24 at Signia by Hilton Atlanta Georgia World Congress Center. USAA will be the presenting sponsor, showcasing dedication to service members, veterans, and families. Another key sponsor is CareSource Military & Veterans, a health management firm catering to TRICARE. This premier event for military-connected individuals, entrepreneurs, and advocates will bring together leaders and professionals in the field. Don't miss this opportunity to join the discussion and network with key players in the military community.

data.title: DeFi whale hit with $40M loss, Kinto folding and SwissBorg hacked. MYX token surges by 1,100%, Worldcoin by 90%.
data.description: The native token of MYX Finance saw the biggest increase of the week, jumping by more than 1,100%. Following closely behind was Worldcoin, which experienced a gain of over 90%.

data.title: Latino Community Foundation doubles 2025 grantmaking, gives $2.9M in Q3 to 52 orgs, focusing on voter engagement and immigrant rights.
data.description: In San Francisco, the Latino Community Foundation disclosed that they distributed $2.95 million to 52 different organizations in the third quarter of 2025. This round of funding also marks the first time grant investments were made in Texas and New Mexico. Almost half of the funds were allocated towards enhancing civic power and facilitating community-based voter engagement efforts. These initiatives aim to equip Latino communities for the upcoming 2026 midterm elections, as well as reinforce protection and advocacy for immigrant rights. Notably, the Foundation's Board approved a substantial 91% increase in grantmaking activities.
